stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
The function of X-TIE is…

options.a: For redundancy in case the ESS TRU fails.
options.b: To allow DC BUS 2 to be supplied in the case of a failure of TRU 2.
options.c: To supply DC BUS 1 when the ESS TRU is feeding the ESS DC BUS.
options.d: To allow DC BUS 1 to supply the ESS DC BUS in the case of ESS TRU failure.
